title: IVR
description: An addon for MTR Mod, provides more features of KCR for the game
body:
**Overview**
---
**IVR**, is an addon for Minecraft Transit Railway(MTR) Mod.

This mod provides two style extra realistic KCR railway signs,Modern Sign and Classical Sign.

You can enjoy more different signs at the same time in your gameplay.

In additional, IVR mod also provide almost **500** symbols for your gameplay to easily simulate KCR railway company.


Requirement 要求
---
1. Fabric (No Forge)
2. Minecraft Transit Railway (version 3.2.2-hotfix1 or above), but **NOT support MTR 4.0**
3. Minecraft 1.16.x-1.19.x

This mod support both of Client side and Server side

**Both** of Client and Server side need to be installed for Server gameplay.

Notice 注意
---
This mod may has bugs.

Please **BACKUP** the world before to use

目前版本可能有潜在的漏洞，使用前請確保已經把世界備份好。

If you have any issue,please report at https://github.com/Hulan1234/IVR-Mod

Future Vision
---
1. Support Minecraft 1.20.1
2. KCR Route Maps.
3. Support Forge
4. Support MTR 4.0(after 500 years)
